case_title: JULIO LAGUES AKA MANUEL LERMA VS. SCOTT ALLEY ASSOCIATES, LLC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY RECVD CHECK FROM STATE OF CA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JULIO LAGUES AKA MANUEL LERMA AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT ALLEY ASSOCIATES, LLC., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
